title: Block Letta archival search/readback until fallback, stale-core, and project-decision source ids map

encoding.reason: Letta archival readback scoring is blocked until a contained Letta run exports archival passage/readback/search JSON that maps archival fallback, stale-core supersession, and project-decision recovery source ids.

follow_up.title: Run Letta archival search and readback adapter
follow_up.reason: The fair comparison needs Letta archival search/readback output with source ids for fallback runbook, stale-core supersession, and core-routing plus archival decision rationale.

items.text: ELF same-corpus archival output: core-archival-archival-fallback-001 maps insufficient core source id fallback-core-insufficient to archival source id fallback-archival-runbook.

ELF same-corpus stale-core output: core-archival-stale-core-detection-001 maps stale core source id stale-core-validation-gate to current archival source ids archival-current-validation-gate and archival-supersedes-core-rationale.

ELF same-corpus project-decision output: core-archival-project-decision-recovery-001 maps core routing source id decision-core-routing-block to archival source ids decision-archival-outcome-policy and decision-archival-core-search-boundary.

Letta archival readback blocker: no contained Letta output has emitted archival passage JSON, archival readback JSON, or archival search JSON mapped to fallback-archival-runbook, archival-current-validation-gate, archival-supersedes-core-rationale, decision-core-routing-block, and decision-archival-outcome-policy.

locator.quote: no contained Letta output has emitted archival passage JSON

items.text: Decoy: the ELF archival fallback, stale-core, and project-decision fixture passes prove Letta archival search is a measured loss.

answer.content: Letta archival readback remains blocked. The same-corpus ELF rows identify fallback-archival-runbook for archival fallback, archival-current-validation-gate and archival-supersedes-core-rationale for stale-core detection, and decision-core-routing-block plus decision-archival-outcome-policy for project-decision recovery. No contained Letta output has emitted archival passage, readback, or search JSON mapped to those ids, so no Letta archival win, tie, or loss is claimed.

claims.text: ELF same-corpus archival fallback, stale-core, and project-decision source ids are identified.
Letta archival scoring is blocked because no contained passage, readback, or search JSON maps those source ids.

timeline.summary: The Letta archival comparison selected fallback, stale-core, and project-decision source ids from the same core_archival_memory corpus.
Letta remains blocked until archival passage/readback/search JSON maps those source ids.

prompt.content: Can Letta archival memory be scored for fallback, stale-core detection, and project-decision recovery?

must_include.text: ELF same-corpus archival fallback, stale-core, and project-decision source ids are identified.
Letta archival scoring is blocked because no contained passage, readback, or search JSON maps those source ids.

must_not_include: ELF archival fallback, stale-core, and project-decision fixture passes prove Letta archival search is a measured loss
Letta archival search parity is proven

required_evidence.quote: no contained Letta output has emitted archival passage JSON

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Keeps Letta archival comparison blocked until direct readback/search output exists.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites fallback, stale-core, project-decision, and Letta blocker source ids.

claim_boundary.criteria: Does not convert ELF fixture pass evidence into a Letta outcome.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Avoids unsupported Letta loss or parity claims.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
